'''Ydde''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Ortolan/Legends|Ortolan]] [[Merchant/Legends|trader]] who lived in the [[Outsider Citadel/Legends|Outsider Citadel]] on [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]], shortly before the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]].

==Biography==
Ydde was good friends with [[Ki-Adi-Mundi/Legends|Ki-Adi-Mundi]], often helping Ki track people on the planet. He was caught overhearing the plans of [[Council of Elders (Cerea)|Cerean Elder]] [[Dorr-Femi-Bonmi]] and [[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]] to import [[Swoop/Legends|swoops]] and other technology to [[Cerea/Legends|Cerea]] in exchange for quantities of [[malium]]. He tried to escape the citadel, but was executed for his complicity by the Elder's henchmen.<ref name="SW2">[[Star Wars (1998) 2|''Star Wars'' (1998) 2]]</ref>

Ydde was survived by his extended family on [[Orto/Legends|Orto]].

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Nem Bees]] assumed Ydde's identity during an undercover mission to Orto.<ref name="DB-Bees, Nem">{{DB|character|nembees|Bees, Nem}}</ref>
